resources.string: Searching for Macs on your network…
No Macs found yet. On your Mac, open Bòcan settings and click Pair a phone.
Type the six digit code shown on %1$s.
This code does not match. Someone may be interfering with your network, or you tapped the wrong Mac.
Too many incorrect codes. Start the pairing again.
Pairing timed out. On your Mac, click Pair a phone again.
The Mac rejected the pairing. Please try again.
The Mac is busy updating its library. Try again in a moment.
Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.
Could not reach the Mac. Check that both devices are on the same Wi-Fi network.
The Mac\'s identity could not be verified. Do not continue; try pairing again.
This Mac is running a newer version of Bòcan. Update Bòcan on your phone.
